title: Frame-Chaining: How Pros Fake Long AI Videos
meta_description: Learn the frame-chaining technique pros use to stitch short AI clips into continuous-looking videos, using Grok Imagine and similar tools.

title: Seedance 2.0 Solves AI Video's Continuity Problem
meta_description: Frame chaining and native lip-sync in Seedance 2.0 finally fix AI video continuity. Real pipeline notes from three weeks of production work.
